extension.description: Remote side of Port Relay, a port relay for exposing local TCP and Unix socket endpoints inside VS Code remote workspaces.
commands.start.title: Port Relay: Start Remote
commands.stop.title: Port Relay: Stop Remote
commands.restart.title: Port Relay: Restart Remote
commands.reconnectControl.title: Port Relay: Reconnect Control Channel
commands.showRemoteStatus.title: Port Relay: Show Remote Status
configuration.autoStart.description: Start configured endpoint relays automatically in remote windows.
configuration.mappings.description: Local-to-remote endpoint mappings. Each mapping connects one or more remote endpoints to one or more local fallback endpoints.
configuration.mapping.enabled.descriptio: Whether this mapping is active. Defaults to true.
configuration.mapping.name.description: Stable mapping name. Defaults to a name generated from the first local and remote endpoints.
configuration.mapping.local.description: Local target endpoint or ordered fallback endpoints. Use host:port, tcp:host:port, tcp://host:port, or unix:/absolute/path.sock.
configuration.mapping.remote.description: Remote exposed endpoint or endpoints to create. Use host:port, tcp:host:port, tcp://host:port, or unix:/absolute/path.sock.
configuration.controlReconnectDelayMs.de: Delay before recreating the internal control tunnel after it is closed.
